title: PM Schema V2 UI P6 Schedule Context Import And Read Bridge Implementation
objective: Implement the smallest bounded P6 schedule-context import and read-only bridge needed to populate persisted planning metadata for the PM prototype surfaces, proving that imported schedule dates, float, relationship data, and hierarchy context can land alongside the governed seam-backed entities without enabling schedule-write behavior, Gantt mutation paths, Class D behavior, billing finalization, or direct client writes for controlled operational state.
active_role: PM UI P6 Schedule Bridge Architect
constrained_outputs: One bounded P6 import and schedule-context persistence path landing read-only planning metadata alongside the seam-backed prototype entities
One read-only bridge exposing schedule context to PM-facing read models without introducing schedule-write behavior
One execution handoff documenting imported schedule fields, preserved P6 boundary rules, and validation results
No implementation beyond the bounded schedule-context import and bridge modules it directly requires
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-002a lands only the bounded P6-derived schedule context and read-only bridge required by the current PM prototype lane
Confirm imported schedule data remains read-only and no schedule-write path bypasses the governed mutation seam
Confirm PM-facing read models can retrieve imported schedule dates, float, and hierarchy context without breaking existing prototype surfaces
Confirm no Gantt write behavior, Class D behavior, billing finalization workflow, or broad production-hardening is implemented by convenience
sql_permission_note: Packet UI-002a authorizes only the bounded P6-derived schedule-context import and read-only bridge alongside the existing seam-backed prototype. It does not authorize schedule-write behavior, direct client-write bypass, Class D finance behavior, or billing finalization design.
